message:
fix(ci): use macos-15-intel for x86_64 macOS builds

macos-15 is an ARM runner, which cannot natively build x86_64 targets.
Use macos-15-intel for x86_64-apple-darwin cross-compilation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -175,7 +175,7 @@ jobs:
             target: aarch64-apple-darwin
             name: macos-arm64
           # macOS Intel
-          - os: macos-15
+          - os: macos-15-intel
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
             name: macos-x64
           # Windows x64
